# Fixture: no_submit_support_ticket_phrasing
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 9.1s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi David! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I was trying to log in but my account says banned. I can't get in at all.

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Email support@shiftsmart.com with your phone number and what the app is showing you. The team can look into your account from there.
